problem id: 876806f0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  11100110 -> 01000011
  01101010 -> 01100101
  10000011 -> 11011001
  00000101 -> 10101010
  11011001 -> 00100100
  10100000 -> 01010000
  01110011 -> 00100001
  01100001 -> 10111000
  00100001 -> 10011000
  00001101 -> 11101110

query: 00101010
predicted answer: 01000101
